backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a QR code image replacement feature (Google Pay QR for Luminia Gadgets) to its affected file PaymentSection.tsx and associated components/test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including color variables for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Luminia Group React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order (WelcomePopup, Navigation, HeroSection, DiscountCountdown, etc.) wrapped in a React Query provider.
frontend/src/components/AssuredToursSect: Scroll-animated section for the Assured Tours & Travels division displaying a banner, image pair, six service cards, and a WhatsApp booking CTA button.
frontend/src/components/ComingSoonSectio: Section showcasing three upcoming Luminia brands (Gadgets, Moda Vestra, Velocity Vogue) as animated cards with 'Launching Soon' badges and WhatsApp notify buttons.
frontend/src/components/DiscountCountdow: Animated countdown timer component displaying days, hours, minutes, and seconds until a promotional deadline, with gold-styled unit boxes and corner accents.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the Luminia Group logo, a portfolio brand list, and contact links (email, WhatsApp), along with a copyright notice and a Tawk.to live chat widget.
frontend/src/components/GSTServicesSecti: Empty file with no content or exports defined.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying the Luminia Group logo, tagline, and a CTA button that smoothly scrolls to the 'assured-tours' section, with scroll-triggered fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaCapturesS: Section showcasing the Luminia Captures photography division with a service grid, banner/gallery images, and a WhatsApp booking CTA button.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaTechLabsS: Section presenting Luminia TechLabs' tech services grid alongside a government services sub-section (Voter ID, Aadhaar, certificates), each card linking to a WhatsApp inquiry message.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Displays a centered manifesto quote from Luminia Group with decorative gold dividers and a stats row showing 7 subsidiaries, infinite ambition, and one vision.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a logo button that scrolls to the top, and a responsive hamburger menu for mobile viewports.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSection.t: Renders a payment section with a two-step UPI/Google Pay flow: first shows a 'Proceed to Pay' button, then reveals a QR code, and on completion opens a WhatsApp confirmation with a generated UTE reference number.
Displays a full-screen 'Coming Soon' placeholder page with the Luminia Group logo, animated fade-in, decorative gold dividers, and a footer copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: A modal overlay component that shows detailed information (images with navigation, description, and an enquire button) for a selected Luminia Group subsidiary, with keyboard navigation and scroll-lock support.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Renders a grid of Luminia Group subsidiary cards (7 businesses) with icons, taglines, and enquire buttons; clicking a card opens the SubsidiaryDetails modal.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePopup.tsx: A full-screen welcome splash screen shown once per session (via sessionStorage) featuring animated gold particles, the Luminia logo, and an 'Enter' button that fades out the popup.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, exported as an empty module for a static corporate website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when an element enters the viewport, returning a ref and visibility boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS variables for the gold/obsidian luxury theme, Tailwind imports, base resets, scrollbar/selection styles, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts: Utility module exporting functions to open WhatsApp with pre-filled messages for bookings, notifications, government services, and payment confirmations using a fixed business number.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with gold/obsidian/ivory color palettes, Cormorant Garamond fonts, zero border-radius defaults, luxury box shadows, and custom keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, known issues, and image requirements for the Luminia Group corporate website build.
